TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == matinengay pacumud i langal ÁĀĆÁĪÉťęėśČč "matinengay pacumud i langal" "pabelin tu nu Zipun SLAM DUNKÔľŹ„āĻ„É©„É†„ÉÄ„É≥„āĮ, kamu nu Sya-kang "u tatama a pacumuden ku mali i langal", u ci Cin-sang-syung-yen kaw-cong mimaliay malaangangan nu Zipunay a mangga. makay 1990 a mihcaan katukuh 1996 a mihcaan I ci-ing-se nu "masakapahay sinbun Jump" lalid sa patahkal. cacayay a cudad hamin 31 a cudadan, hamin a sapad 24 a cudadan, balihay anipazeng tu niliyawan misulit a sapad hamin 20 a cudadan. Zipun a mangga a nipatahkalan malakii' tu walwalen 2 a malebut mang ku cudad. mimaliay mangga i cayay katatudung a masakapahay ci Ing-mu-hwa-taw nipilebu atu nikabalaki. nisanga'an "syang-pe" kaow-cong a nizatingan, angnangan nu Zipuna sen-nay-cwan kuwan a Syangn-nan a kakitizaan. 1994 a mihcaan pakala tu saka 10 lekad tu adidi' ay a cacudadan masakapahay mangga a kawlah. i 2006 a mihcaan nu lalangawanay ku mikawaway sinbun nu Zipun tu musaungayay mangga tu pipaazihan a kawaw "Zipun sinbun isupinaaay a lasubu ku nipipili'" i kasasizuma nu mangga pakala tu icibang. duduc tu "DA VINCI" nigingkiwanpulung izaw ku 808 ku tademaw nu migingkiway a tademaw, misabuheciay, patiyamay tu cudad pacakayay a tademaw atu mapili' ku miasipay, a i 50 a mihcaan mangga a likisian u saayaway ku ngangan nu silac nu mangga. 2001 a mihcaan ku nipatahkal hamin u m an gga, nu ci-ing-se saayaway a cudad hamin xu mangga. Uyni a cudzad saka 21 a cudad~ saka 23 a cudad nu saayaway sapad nipatahkalan252 mang a cudadan, i tawya su satalakaway a nikiluan. Katukuh 2013 a mihca 3 bulad pulung hank u nipatahkal malakii' ku 1 walwalen 2029 mang. "matinengay pacumud i langal" a mangga nalulitan i 1996 a mkihcaan "27 manggu' pahezek. i zikuz kilul tatapangan madademec tu min-kung-ye, talakaway cac udadan, ay atu talakaway a cacudada, ta-lung picudadantalakawsay ca cudadan, sazikuzay mademec nu ay atu talakaway a cacudada. cin-sang i pahezekan musakamu, "anu caay i pahezek a kitizaan pahezek hawsa, sakay nisanga' uyza u cayay kaleme." sakay lalid asa patahkal tu "hakay izaay tu". 2004 a mihca 12 a bulad 3 a demiad, amikukay ci Cin-sang tu "matinengay pacumud i langal" nipacakayan malakii' tu cacay a walwalen ku cudadan, i Zipun nu Sen-nay-cowan kuwan Li-san-I kaw-cung a pilabinan tu maalesaytu a cacudadan tulu a demiad ku pikawaw "matinengay pacumud i langal" nipacakayan cacay a walwalen ku cudadan kining a kawa FINAL EVENT". mikitadu tu sepat a dimiad u ben-pi ku pikulit 23 tilad picudadan a kokuban, musakamu tu kadademec nu hamin nu kanatal cacay a bataan zikuz a kawaw atu malaangangan nikuzan nu palahad, 2009 a mihca 4 a bulad "nacacay a demiad a matinengay pacumud i langal" mahamin mapacakay. 2018 a mihca 6 a bulad 1 demiad "baluhay a nipazeng muliyaw musanga'" a patahkal. 2021 a mihca 1 a bulad 7 a demiad ci Cin-sang nux uzipay ,micidek a patahkal musakamu tu "matinengay pacumud i langal" musaungayay mangga a kacudu, pacena' a paketun tu nngangan nu iga u "SLAM DUNK „āĻ„É©„É†„ÉÄ„É≥„āĮ 30 a mihcaan a pikiningan„āĘ„Éč„É°„Éľ„ā∑„Éß„É≥ a igaan". 2022 amihca 7 a bulad patahkal tu tatenga'ay ngangan nu iga u "matinengay pacumud i langal" THE FIRST SLAM DUNK" 2021ŚĻī1śúą7 "SLAM DUNK THE FIRST SLAM DUNK". kungku śēÖšļč ci Ing-hwa-taw i saka 50 ce musakamu tu nikasepayan caliwaya kow-cong tu tulu a mihcaan, amalingatu mabidang milami. nika ci Ing-mu-sen Sang-syang-pey kaw-cung iciningsi tu cacay a demiad, amisungaay malecaday a mihcaan a picudad kalemuan sa ci Ce-mu-cin-c a manamuh, ianayi' ku tineng mimali a caay pizateng ciniza amikaut misakaput mimali, ci Cin-c makay cu-cung malingatu manamuh tu mimaliay a hayyu ci Liw-cwan-bung. u tineng ni Ing-mu, kakapah nu uzip cunus tu caay kademec ku balucu' uyza u kacekutan ku icelang dadawa ku kacakat, maymaw sa makay nauyaanay mimaliay maliyuhay ci Syang-pey kaw-cung mimaliay sakaput u cayay kainayi nu icelangay nu mimaliay. lecad a mihcaan, kow-cung u hay utu nu mimaliay a Liw-cwan-bung milalu tu Syang-pey kaw-cung mikaputuway tu mimaliay, nabalucu'an maydih tahkal tu kanatal mimali, nika i Si-an tu pituzu' nu mikulinay, paketu ayaw mala "saayaway nu Zipun" a kaw-cung nu mimaliay. 1993 a mihca 10 a bulad 16 a demiad katukuh 1996 a mihca 3 a bulad 23 a demiad I caw-ze tilibi wangcan saayaway patahkal pulung 102 ku kamu "labu nipaazihan ci Syang-pey ayaw a mumul tayza i kadademec nu hamin nu kanatal amasatezep", izaw ku tusa kamju tu mkicidekay a nisulitan. misanga' tu tung-yang musaungayay mangga. Taywan uya Cong-hwa-tilibi kusi I 1995 a mihca 5 abulad 7 a demiad katukuh 1998 a mihca 11 abilad 14 a demiad ku saayaway patahlal, hamin u hwa-se iga sakaku sa pabelin tu cudad i aazihan " i kasa cacay a piazihan tu cudad zikuz, saayaway sasakamuen ayaw maazih ku ngangan nu pabelinay", mahatartusa ku kamu a tahkal, angangan nu iga sumaden au nu hwa-s uzip ku misanga'ay tup yaw-ti, tatangahan atu zikuzay a iga hini sa ku mikawaway saka 24 kamu caay patahkalen" Cong-kowtilib kusi a igaan u makaycong-s atu caw-ze tilibiay a malakakanaay, maala a situngus patahkal i Taywan, patahkalay tu iga ci Po-ing-se aazihan tu cudad, mahatatusa ku kamu tahkal, tatangahan nu iga a pyaw-ti nuyaanaytu a pan, tatangahan atu zikuzay a iga nuyaanay tu nu mikawaway a aadihan. Syang-akang u Ya-cow a tilibi uyni kang-tay I 1995 a mihca 8 a bulad 20 a demiad katukuh 1996 a mihca 3 a bulad 10 a demiad saayaway patahkal, 2009 a mihca 12 a bulad 20 a demiad na i Ya-cow-kaw-cin tilibi muliyaw patahkal. 1998 a mihcaan Cowng-kow-ta-lu kasa tukay a tilibian patahkal paazih tu hulamay a kamu, saayaway ci Pow-ing-se aazihan tu cudad, uyni a cudad micukaymas tu nu Ba-se ku patatungusay tu ngiha, nika i ngatu sumaden pakutay tu pangihaay.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ **** "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" "pab…ôr~…ĺin tu nu zipun sr~…ĺam dunk*******, kamu nu sja-kaŇč "u tatama a pa ¶umud…ôn ku mar~…ĺi i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ", u ¶i ¶in-saŇč-sjuŇč-j…ôn kaw- ¶oŇč mimar~…ĺiaj mar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčan nu zipunaj a maŇčga. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan i ¶i-iŇč-s…ô nu "masakapańßaj sinbun *ump" r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa patańßkar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶udad ńßamin ** a ¶udadan, ńßamin a sapad ** a ¶udadan, bar~…ĺińßaj anipaz…ôŇč tu nir~…ĺijawan misur~…ĺit a sapad ńßamin ** a ¶udadan. zipun a maŇčga a nipatańßkar~…ĺan mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn * a mar~…ĺ…ôbut maŇč ku ¶udad. mimar~…ĺiaj maŇčga i ¶ajaj katatuduŇč a masakapańßaj ¶i iŇč-mu-ńßwa-taw nipir~…ĺ…ôbu atu nikabar~…ĺaki. nisaŇča Ē~ °an "sjaŇč-p…ô" kaow- ¶oŇč a nizatiŇčan, aŇčnaŇčan nu zipuna s…ôn-naj- ¶wan kuwan a sjaŇčn-nan a kakitizaan. **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu saka ** r~…ĺ…ôkad tu adidi Ē~ ° aj a ¶a ¶udadan masakapańßaj maŇčga a kawr~…ĺańß. i **** a mińß ¶aan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawanaj ku mikawawaj sinbun nu zipun tu musauŇčajaj maŇčga tu pipaazińßan a kawaw "zipun sinbun isupinaaaj a r~…ĺasubu ku nipipir~…ĺi Ē~ °" i kasasizuma nu maŇčga pakar~…ĺa tu i ¶ibaŇč. dudu ¶ tu "da *in ¶i" nigiŇčkiwanpur~…ĺuŇč izaw ku *** ku tad…ômaw nu migiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw, misabuńß…ô ¶iaj, patijamaj tu ¶udad pa ¶akajaj a tad…ômaw atu mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku miasipaj, a i ** a mińß ¶aan maŇčga a r~…ĺikisian u saajawaj ku ŇčaŇčan nu sir~…ĺa ¶ nu maŇčga. **** a mińß ¶aan ku nipatańßkar~…ĺ ńßamin u m an gga, nu ¶i-iŇč-s…ô saajawaj a ¶udad ńßamin *u maŇčga. ujni a ¶udzad saka ** a ¶udad~ saka ** a ¶udad nu saajawaj sapad nipatańßkar~…ĺan*** maŇč a ¶udadan, i tawja su satar~…ĺakawaj a nikir~…ĺuan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč ńßank u nipatańßkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° ku * war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn **** maŇč. "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" a maŇčga nar~…ĺur~…ĺitan i **** a mkińß ¶aan "** maŇčgu Ē~ ° pańß…ôz…ôk. i zikuz kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tatapaŇčan madad…ôm…ô ¶ tu min-kuŇč-j…ô, tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶ udadan, aj atu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udada, ta-r~…ĺuŇč pi ¶udadantar~…ĺakawsaj ¶a ¶udadan, sazikuzaj mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu aj atu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udada. ¶in-saŇč i pańß…ôz…ôkan musakamu, "anu ¶aaj i pańß…ôz…ôk a kitizaan pańß…ôz…ôk ńßawsa, sakaj nisaŇča Ē~ ° ujza u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ôm…ô." sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid asa patańßkar~…ĺ tu "ńßakaj izaaj tu". **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, amikukaj ¶i ¶in-saŇč tu "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" nipa ¶akajan mar~…ĺakii Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj a war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku ¶udadan, i zipun nu s…ôn-naj- ¶owan kuwan r~…ĺi-san-i kaw- ¶uŇč a pir~…ĺabinan tu maar~…ĺ…ôsajtu a ¶a ¶udadan tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad ku pikawaw "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" nipa ¶akajan ¶a ¶aj a war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn ku ¶udadan kiniŇč a kawa finar~…ĺ …ô*…ônt". mikitadu tu s…ôpat a dimiad u b…ôn-pi ku pikur~…ĺit ** tir~…ĺad pi ¶udadan a kokuban, musakamu tu kadad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj a bataan zikuz a kawaw atu mar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčan nikuzan nu par~…ĺańßad, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad "na ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad a matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" mańßamin mapa ¶akaj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad "bar~…ĺuńßaj a nipaz…ôŇč mur~…ĺijaw musaŇča Ē~ °" a patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad ¶i ¶in-saŇč nu* uzipaj ,mi ¶id…ôk a patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" musauŇčajaj maŇčga a ka ¶udu, pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° a pak…ôtun tu nŇčaŇčan nu iga u "sr~…ĺam dunk ****** ** a mińß ¶aan a pikiniŇčan******* a igaan". **** amińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad patańßkar~…ĺ tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ŇčaŇčan nu iga u "matin…ôŇčaj pa ¶umud i r~…ĺaŇčar~…ĺ" tńß…ô fi*st sr~…ĺam dunk" ******** "sr~…ĺam dunk tńß…ô fi*st sr~…ĺam dunk". kuŇčku ** ¶i iŇč-ńßwa-taw i saka ** ¶…ô musakamu tu nikas…ôpajan ¶ar~…ĺiwaja kow- ¶oŇč tu tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan, amar~…ĺiŇčatu mabidaŇč mir~…ĺami. nika ¶i iŇč-mu-s…ôn saŇč-sjaŇč-p…ô kaw- ¶uŇč i ¶iniŇčsi tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, amisuŇčaaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a mińß ¶aan a pi ¶udad kar~…ĺ…ômuan sa ¶i ¶…ô-mu- ¶in- ¶ a manamuńß, ianaji Ē~ ° ku tin…ôŇč mimar~…ĺi a ¶aaj pizat…ôŇč ¶iniza amikaut misakaput mimar~…ĺi, ¶i ¶in- ¶ makaj ¶u- ¶uŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu manamuńß tu mimar~…ĺiaj a ńßajju ¶i r~…ĺiw- ¶wan-buŇč. u tin…ôŇč ni iŇč-mu, kakapańß nu uzip ¶unus tu ¶aaj kad…ôm…ô ¶ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ujza u ka ¶…ôkutan ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč dadawa ku ka ¶akat, majmaw sa makaj naujaanaj mimar~…ĺiaj mar~…ĺijuńßaj ¶i sjaŇč-p…ô kaw- ¶uŇč mimar~…ĺiaj sakaput u ¶ajaj kainaji nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu mimar~…ĺiaj. r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan, kow- ¶uŇč u ńßaj utu nu mimar~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺiw- ¶wan-buŇč mir~…ĺar~…ĺu tu sjaŇč-p…ô kaw- ¶uŇč mikaputuwaj tu mimar~…ĺiaj, nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an majdińß tańßkar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ mimar~…ĺi, nika i si-an tu pituzu Ē~ ° nu mikur~…ĺinaj, pak…ôtu ajaw mar~…ĺa "saajawaj nu zipun" a kaw- ¶uŇč nu mimar~…ĺiaj. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad i ¶aw-z…ô tir~…ĺibi waŇč ¶an saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč *** ku kamu "r~…ĺabu nipaazińßan ¶i sjaŇč-p…ô ajaw a mumur~…ĺ tajza i kadad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ amasat…ôz…ôp", izaw ku tusa kamju tu mki ¶id…ôkaj a nisur~…ĺitan. misaŇča Ē~ ° tu tuŇč-jaŇč musauŇčajaj maŇčga. tajwan uja ¶oŇč-ńßwa-tir~…ĺibi kusi i **** a mińß ¶a * abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** abir~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ku saajawaj patańßr~…ĺar~…ĺ, ńßamin u ńßwa-s…ô iga sakaku sa pab…ôr~…ĺin tu ¶udad i aazińßan " i kasa ¶a ¶aj a piazińßan tu ¶udad zikuz, saajawaj sasakamu…ôn ajaw maazińß ku ŇčaŇčan nu pab…ôr~…ĺinaj", mańßatartusa ku kamu a tańßkar~…ĺ, aŇčaŇčan nu iga sumad…ôn au nu ńßwa-s uzip ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj tup jaw-ti, tataŇčańßan atu zikuzaj a iga ńßini sa ku mikawawaj saka ** kamu ¶aaj patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn" ¶oŇč-kowtir~…ĺib kusi a igaan u makaj ¶oŇč-s atu ¶aw-z…ô tir~…ĺibiaj a mar~…ĺakakanaaj, maar~…ĺa a situŇčus patańßkar~…ĺ i tajwan, patańßkar~…ĺaj tu iga ¶i po-iŇč-s…ô aazińßan tu ¶udad, mańßatatusa ku kamu tańßkar~…ĺ, tataŇčańßan nu iga a pjaw-ti nujaanajtu a pan, tataŇčańßan atu zikuzaj a iga nujaanaj tu nu mikawawaj a aadińßan. sjaŇč-akaŇč u ja- ¶ow a tir~…ĺibi ujni kaŇč-taj i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad na i ja- ¶ow-kaw- ¶in tir~…ĺibi mur~…ĺijaw patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶owŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu kasa tukaj a tir~…ĺibian patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu ńßur~…ĺamaj a kamu, saajawaj ¶i pow-iŇč-s…ô aazińßan tu ¶udad, ujni a ¶udad mi ¶ukajmas tu nu ba-s…ô ku patatuŇčusaj tu Ňčińßa, nika i Ňčatu sumad…ôn pakutaj tu paŇčińßaaj.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == matinengay pacumud i langal ÁĀĆÁĪÉťęėśČč "matinengay pacumud i langal" "pabelin tu nu Zipun SLAM DUNKÔľŹ„āĻ„É©„É†„ÉÄ„É≥„āĮ, kamu nu Sya-kang "u tatama a pacumuden ku mali i langal", u ci Cin-sang-syung-yen kaw-cong mimaliay malaangangan nu Zipunay a mangga. makay 1990 a mihcaan katukuh 1996 a mihcaan I ci-ing-se nu "masakapahay sinbun Jump" lalid sa patahkal. cacayay a cudad hamin 31 a cudadan, hamin a sapad 24 a cudadan, balihay anipazeng tu niliyawan misulit a sapad hamin 20 a cudadan. Zipun a mangga a nipatahkalan malakii' tu walwalen 2 a malebut mang ku cudad. mimaliay mangga i cayay katatudung a masakapahay ci Ing-mu-hwa-taw nipilebu atu nikabalaki. nisanga'an "syang-pe" kaow-cong a nizatingan, angnangan nu Zipuna sen-nay-cwan kuwan a Syangn-nan a kakitizaan. 1994 a mihcaan pakala tu saka 10 lekad tu adidi' ay a cacudadan masakapahay mangga a kawlah. i 2006 a mihcaan nu lalangawanay ku mikawaway sinbun nu Zipun tu musaungayay mangga tu pipaazihan a kawaw "Zipun sinbun isupinaaay a lasubu ku nipipili'" i kasasizuma nu mangga pakala tu icibang. duduc tu "DA VINCI" nigingkiwanpulung izaw ku 808 ku tademaw nu migingkiway a tademaw, misabuheciay, patiyamay tu cudad pacakayay a tademaw atu mapili' ku miasipay, a i 50 a mihcaan mangga a likisian u saayaway ku ngangan nu silac nu mangga. 2001 a mihcaan ku nipatahkal hamin u m an gga, nu ci-ing-se saayaway a cudad hamin xu mangga. Uyni a cudzad saka 21 a cudad~ saka 23 a cudad nu saayaway sapad nipatahkalan252 mang a cudadan, i tawya su satalakaway a nikiluan. Katukuh 2013 a mihca 3 bulad pulung hank u nipatahkal malakii' ku 1 walwalen 2029 mang. "matinengay pacumud i langal" a mangga nalulitan i 1996 a mkihcaan "27 manggu' pahezek. i zikuz kilul tatapangan madademec tu min-kung-ye, talakaway cac udadan, ay atu talakaway a cacudada, ta-lung picudadantalakawsay ca cudadan, sazikuzay mademec nu ay atu talakaway a cacudada. cin-sang i pahezekan musakamu, "anu caay i pahezek a kitizaan pahezek hawsa, sakay nisanga' uyza u cayay kaleme." sakay lalid asa patahkal tu "hakay izaay tu". 2004 a mihca 12 a bulad 3 a demiad, amikukay ci Cin-sang tu "matinengay pacumud i langal" nipacakayan malakii' tu cacay a walwalen ku cudadan, i Zipun nu Sen-nay-cowan kuwan Li-san-I kaw-cung a pilabinan tu maalesaytu a cacudadan tulu a demiad ku pikawaw "matinengay pacumud i langal" nipacakayan cacay a walwalen ku cudadan kining a kawa FINAL EVENT". mikitadu tu sepat a dimiad u ben-pi ku pikulit 23 tilad picudadan a kokuban, musakamu tu kadademec nu hamin nu kanatal cacay a bataan zikuz a kawaw atu malaangangan nikuzan nu palahad, 2009 a mihca 4 a bulad "nacacay a demiad a matinengay pacumud i langal" mahamin mapacakay. 2018 a mihca 6 a bulad 1 demiad "baluhay a nipazeng muliyaw musanga'" a patahkal. 2021 a mihca 1 a bulad 7 a demiad ci Cin-sang nux uzipay ,micidek a patahkal musakamu tu "matinengay pacumud i langal" musaungayay mangga a kacudu, pacena' a paketun tu nngangan nu iga u "SLAM DUNK „āĻ„É©„É†„ÉÄ„É≥„āĮ 30 a mihcaan a pikiningan„āĘ„Éč„É°„Éľ„ā∑„Éß„É≥ a igaan". 2022 amihca 7 a bulad patahkal tu tatenga'ay ngangan nu iga u "matinengay pacumud i langal" THE FIRST SLAM DUNK" 2021ŚĻī1śúą7 "SLAM DUNK THE FIRST SLAM DUNK". kungku śēÖšļč ci Ing-hwa-taw i saka 50 ce musakamu tu nikasepayan caliwaya kow-cong tu tulu a mihcaan, amalingatu mabidang milami. nika ci Ing-mu-sen Sang-syang-pey kaw-cung iciningsi tu cacay a demiad, amisungaay malecaday a mihcaan a picudad kalemuan sa ci Ce-mu-cin-c a manamuh, ianayi' ku tineng mimali a caay pizateng ciniza amikaut misakaput mimali, ci Cin-c makay cu-cung malingatu manamuh tu mimaliay a hayyu ci Liw-cwan-bung. u tineng ni Ing-mu, kakapah nu uzip cunus tu caay kademec ku balucu' uyza u kacekutan ku icelang dadawa ku kacakat, maymaw sa makay nauyaanay mimaliay maliyuhay ci Syang-pey kaw-cung mimaliay sakaput u cayay kainayi nu icelangay nu mimaliay. lecad a mihcaan, kow-cung u hay utu nu mimaliay a Liw-cwan-bung milalu tu Syang-pey kaw-cung mikaputuway tu mimaliay, nabalucu'an maydih tahkal tu kanatal mimali, nika i Si-an tu pituzu' nu mikulinay, paketu ayaw mala "saayaway nu Zipun" a kaw-cung nu mimaliay. 1993 a mihca 10 a bulad 16 a demiad katukuh 1996 a mihca 3 a bulad 23 a demiad I caw-ze tilibi wangcan saayaway patahkal pulung 102 ku kamu "labu nipaazihan ci Syang-pey ayaw a mumul tayza i kadademec nu hamin nu kanatal amasatezep", izaw ku tusa kamju tu mkicidekay a nisulitan. misanga' tu tung-yang musaungayay mangga. Taywan uya Cong-hwa-tilibi kusi I 1995 a mihca 5 abulad 7 a demiad katukuh 1998 a mihca 11 abilad 14 a demiad ku saayaway patahlal, hamin u hwa-se iga sakaku sa pabelin tu cudad i aazihan " i kasa cacay a piazihan tu cudad zikuz, saayaway sasakamuen ayaw maazih ku ngangan nu pabelinay", mahatartusa ku kamu a tahkal, angangan nu iga sumaden au nu hwa-s uzip ku misanga'ay tup yaw-ti, tatangahan atu zikuzay a iga hini sa ku mikawaway saka 24 kamu caay patahkalen" Cong-kowtilib kusi a igaan u makaycong-s atu caw-ze tilibiay a malakakanaay, maala a situngus patahkal i Taywan, patahkalay tu iga ci Po-ing-se aazihan tu cudad, mahatatusa ku kamu tahkal, tatangahan nu iga a pyaw-ti nuyaanaytu a pan, tatangahan atu zikuzay a iga nuyaanay tu nu mikawaway a aadihan. Syang-akang u Ya-cow a tilibi uyni kang-tay I 1995 a mihca 8 a bulad 20 a demiad katukuh 1996 a mihca 3 a bulad 10 a demiad saayaway patahkal, 2009 a mihca 12 a bulad 20 a demiad na i Ya-cow-kaw-cin tilibi muliyaw patahkal. 1998 a mihcaan Cowng-kow-ta-lu kasa tukay a tilibian patahkal paazih tu hulamay a kamu, saayaway ci Pow-ing-se aazihan tu cudad, uyni a cudad micukaymas tu nu Ba-se ku patatungusay tu ngiha, nika i ngatu sumaden pakutay tu pangihaay.
